TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gluw_na_p’unggak_A-Ha, title = gluw_na_p’unggak_A-Ha, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gluw_na_p’unggak_A-Ha} }

S.FORM: == A-Ha == gluw na p'unggak A-Ha hya' ga pins'rux kya sa Norway squw kawas na Amerika' sa kawas tay 1982. kahul squw spzyang ppqwas ka Morten Harket,Keyboard player Magne Furuholmen ruw ptlubuw gita' ka Pål Waaktaar-Savoy msqun ps'rux sa gluw na ppqwas qaniy. Nanu' squw kawas na Amerika' ka 1985 ga, kinbalay naha' qutux qwas ka Hunting High and Low ga wal niya' galuw nanak kya niwan knaki' niya' sa inkhulan niya' nanak Norway quw champion na qwas niya'. ray nibang kinbalay qwas na United Kingdom hya', Amerika' hya' ga tay mawpuw zmagal binkgan laha' hya'. Nanu' quw min'imaw kya ka qutux balay qwas ka Take On Me ruw The Sun Always Shines On TV hya' ga, pzyux wal naha' galun tay koka' bzinah champion lasa la. mtnaq sa kawas qasa ga pnawsa' pbiru' na qqabu' na Grammy Award maha pzyang blaq balay na giqas na ppqwas.nanu' quw qwas qutux nanak ka Take On Me na MV qasa ga skbalay naha' sa mangga' pinqzyuwan niya' kbalay sa kamuk. kawas qasa ga mtzyu' qnabu' wayal niya' galun sa MTV Music Awards. The Sun Always Shines On TV hya' ga sazing wal niya' galun hya'.

== A-Ha == gluw na p'unggak A-Ha hya' ga pins'rux kya sa Norway squw kawas na Amerika' sa kawas tay 1982. kahul squw spzyang ppqwas ka Morten Harket,Keyboard player Magne Furuholmen ruw ptlubuw gita' ka Pål Waaktaar-Savoy msqun ps'rux sa gluw na ppqwas qaniy. Nanu' squw kawas na Amerika' ka 1985 ga, kinbalay naha' qutux qwas ka Hunting High and Low ga wal niya' galuw nanak kya niwan knaki' niya' sa inkhulan niya' nanak Norway quw champion na qwas niya'. ray nibang kinbalay qwas na United Kingdom hya', Amerika' hya' ga tay mawpuw zmagal binkgan laha' hya'. Nanu' quw min'imaw kya ka qutux balay qwas ka Take On Me ruw The Sun Always Shines On TV hya' ga, pzyux wal naha' galun tay koka' bzinah champion lasa la. mtnaq sa kawas qasa ga pnawsa' pbiru' na qqabu' na Grammy Award maha pzyang blaq balay na giqas na ppqwas.nanu' quw qwas qutux nanak ka Take On Me na MV qasa ga skbalay naha' sa mangga' pinqzyuwan niya' kbalay sa kamuk. kawas qasa ga mtzyu' qnabu' wayal niya' galun sa MTV Music Awards. The Sun Always Shines On TV hya' ga sazing wal niya' galun hya'.
S.PHON: == a-ħa == ɣluw na pʔuŋɣak a-ħa ħjaʔ ɣa pins~ɕʔrux kja s~ɕa norwaj s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ na amerikaʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****. kaħul s~ɕquw s~ɕpzjaŋ ppqwas~ɕ ka morten ħarket,kejβoar* plajer maɣne *uruħolmen ruw ptluβuw ɣitaʔ ka p*l waaktaar-s~ɕa*oj ms~ɕqun ps~ɕʔrux s~ɕa ɣluw na ppqwas~ɕ qanij. nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ na amerikaʔ ka **** ɣa, kinβalaj naħaʔ qutux qwas~ɕ ka ħuntiŋ ħiɣħ an* low ɣa wal nijaʔ ɣaluw nanak kja niwan knakiʔ nijaʔ s~ɕa inkħulan nijaʔ nanak norwaj quw ʦ~ʨħampion na qwas~ɕ nijaʔ. raj niβaŋ kinβalaj qwas~ɕ na unite* kiŋ*om ħjaʔ, amerikaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa taj mawpuw zmaɣal βinkɣan laħaʔ ħjaʔ. nanuʔ quw minʔimaw kja ka qutux βalaj qwas~ɕ ka take on me ruw tħe s~ɕun alwajs~ɕ s~ɕħines~ɕ on t* ħjaʔ ɣa, pzjux wal naħaʔ ɣalun taj kokaʔ βzinaħ ʦ~ʨħampion las~ɕa la. mtnaq s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa pnaws~ɕaʔ pβiruʔ na qqaβuʔ na ɣrammj awar* maħa pzjaŋ βlaq βalaj na ɣiqas~ɕ na ppqwas~ɕ.nanuʔ quw qwas~ɕ qutux nanak ka take on me na m* qas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕkβalaj naħaʔ s~ɕa maŋɣaʔ pinqzjuwan nijaʔ kβalaj s~ɕa kamuk. kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa mtzjuʔ qnaβuʔ wajal nijaʔ ɣalun s~ɕa mt* mus~ɕiʦ~ʨ awar*s~ɕ. tħe s~ɕun alwajs~ɕ s~ɕħines~ɕ on t* ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaziŋ wal nijaʔ ɣalun ħjaʔ.
